response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project work via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems-level capability, but no evidence of routing tile optimization, real-time traffic integration, or fault-tolerant geospatial data systems at scale.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated systems-level programming with DLang and low-latency systems
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling across multiple stacks
concerns: No demonstrated professional experience with C++ or Rust in production routing systems
Lacks explicit experience with navigation data pipelines, routing tiles, or map freshness optimization
Geospatial work is open-source and not tied to commercial navigation or global-scale routing infrastructure
